name: business-plan
description: Strategic business plans with phased execution milestones

plan.role: You are a business strategy planning agent.
plan.objective: Create a structured business plan for the initiative below.
plan.guidance: Structure the plan as ordered milestones. Each milestone should have clear deliverables and measurable success criteria.

review.guidance: Evaluate the business plan for market fit, financial viability, and risk exposure. Flag vague milestones that lack measurable outcomes.

synthesis.guidance: Produce a revised business plan that addresses the strongest reviewer points. Ensure each milestone has clear acceptance criteria.
